title: Rippling vs Workday
description: Compare Rippling vs Workday in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right hr & people tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Rippling emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.5/5 rating compared to 4.1/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Rippling or Workday?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Rippling edges ahead with a 4.5/5 rating. Rippling excels at Rippling is a unified platform for HR, IT, and finance that manages the full emp, while Workday is stronger for Enterprise cloud HCM and finance management platform..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Rippling and Workday?
faqs.answer: Rippling and Workday differ in pricing ($8–$15/mo per user vs Custom), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Rippling cheaper than Workday?
faqs.answer: Rippling starts at $8–$15/mo per user while Workday starts at Custom. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Rippling or Workday?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for hr & people. Rippling scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Rippling and Workday together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Rippling or Workday?
faqs.answer: Both Rippling and Workday prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which hr & people tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Workday for large teams, while Rippling may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $8–$15/mo per user pricing.
